## 1.0.0-beta.47.53.0 (2026-07-14)


### GET /api/workspaces/notifications/settings
- ⚠️ removed the optional property `settings/deliveryPreferences/healthCheckInCreated` from the response with the `200` status
-  added the optional property `settings/deliveryPreferences/healthCheckInModification` to the response with the `200` status
-  the `deliveryPreferences` response's property default value changed from `map[addedUserToPokerGame:map[email:true inApp:true] appNotification:map[email:true inApp:true] assignedUserToItem:map[email:true inApp:true] commentedOnItem:map[email:true inApp:true] healthCheckInCreated:map[email:true inApp:true] mentions:map[email:true inApp:true] reactedToComment:map[email:true inApp:true] requestedWorkspacePermission:map[email:true inApp:true] updatedItemStatus:map[email:true inApp:true] workspaceMembership:map[email:true inApp:true]]` to `map[addedUserToPokerGame:map[email:true inApp:true] appNotification:map[email:true inApp:true] assignedUserToItem:map[email:true inApp:true] commentedOnItem:map[email:true inApp:true] healthCheckInCreated:map[email:true inApp:true] healthCheckInModification:map[email:true inApp:true] mentions:map[email:true inApp:true] reactedToComment:map[email:true inApp:true] requestedWorkspacePermission:map[email:true inApp:true] updatedItemStatus:map[email:true inApp:true] workspaceMembership:map[email:true inApp:true]]` for the status `200`


### POST /api/workspaces/notifications/settings
- ⚠️ removed the request property `settings/deliveryPreferences/healthCheckInCreated`
- ⚠️ removed the optional property `settings/deliveryPreferences/healthCheckInCreated` from the response with the `200` status
-  added the new optional request property `settings/deliveryPreferences/healthCheckInModification`
-  the `deliveryPreferences` request property default value changed from `map[addedUserToPokerGame:map[email:true inApp:true] appNotification:map[email:true inApp:true] assignedUserToItem:map[email:true inApp:true] commentedOnItem:map[email:true inApp:true] healthCheckInCreated:map[email:true inApp:true] mentions:map[email:true inApp:true] reactedToComment:map[email:true inApp:true] requestedWorkspacePermission:map[email:true inApp:true] updatedItemStatus:map[email:true inApp:true] workspaceMembership:map[email:true inApp:true]]` to `map[addedUserToPokerGame:map[email:true inApp:true] appNotification:map[email:true inApp:true] assignedUserToItem:map[email:true inApp:true] commentedOnItem:map[email:true inApp:true] healthCheckInCreated:map[email:true inApp:true] healthCheckInModification:map[email:true inApp:true] mentions:map[email:true inApp:true] reactedToComment:map[email:true inApp:true] requestedWorkspacePermission:map[email:true inApp:true] updatedItemStatus:map[email:true inApp:true] workspaceMembership:map[email:true inApp:true]]`
-  added the optional property `settings/deliveryPreferences/healthCheckInModification` to the response with the `200` status
-  the `deliveryPreferences` response's property default value changed from `map[addedUserToPokerGame:map[email:true inApp:true] appNotification:map[email:true inApp:true] assignedUserToItem:map[email:true inApp:true] commentedOnItem:map[email:true inApp:true] healthCheckInCreated:map[email:true inApp:true] mentions:map[email:true inApp:true] reactedToComment:map[email:true inApp:true] requestedWorkspacePermission:map[email:true inApp:true] updatedItemStatus:map[email:true inApp:true] workspaceMembership:map[email:true inApp:true]]` to `map[addedUserToPokerGame:map[email:true inApp:true] appNotification:map[email:true inApp:true] assignedUserToItem:map[email:true inApp:true] commentedOnItem:map[email:true inApp:true] healthCheckInCreated:map[email:true inApp:true] healthCheckInModification:map[email:true inApp:true] mentions:map[email:true inApp:true] reactedToComment:map[email:true inApp:true] requestedWorkspacePermission:map[email:true inApp:true] updatedItemStatus:map[email:true inApp:true] workspaceMembership:map[email:true inApp:true]]` for the status `200`
